name: 104"x60" Tablecloth Blue Floral - Threshold™
description:
This Blue Floral Tablecloth from Threshold™ brings artistic flair to your tablescape. Made from 100% cotton, this rectangular tablecloth offers protection against spills, stains, and scratches. Adorned with allover floral print on a blue background, this decorative tablecloth brings sweet charm to your space, while the machine-washable design makes cleaning a breeze.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
